name: Career Awards at the Scientific Interface (CASI)
reason: Eligibility requires 12-60 months of postdoctoral experience, but the applicant has ~6 years (~72 months) of postdoc experience, exceeding the 60-month cap.

name: Postdoctoral Enrichment Program (PDEP)
reason: Caps eligibility at no more than 48 months of postdoctoral experience and no more than 5 years from PhD, but the applicant is ~6 years into his postdoc and ~7 years past his August 2019 PhD.

name: Pew Scholars Program in the Biomedical Sciences (Pew Biomedical Scholars)
reason: Requires holding a full-time, tenure-track assistant professor appointment running an independent lab as of the cutoff, but the applicant is still a postdoc.

name: Searle Scholars Program
reason: Requires having begun a first tenure-track (or nearest-equivalent) assistant-professor appointment, which the applicant (a postdoc) does not hold.

name: Rita Allen Foundation Scholars
reason: Intended for investigators early in their own independent (faculty) research careers, whereas the applicant remains a postdoc without an independent appointment.

name: Beckman Young Investigator (BYI) Program
reason: Requires being within the first 4 years of a tenure-track (or equivalent independent) research appointment, but the applicant holds no such appointment and is still a postdoc.

name: Clinical Scientist Development Award (CSDA)
reason: Restricted to physician-scientists holding an MD, DO, MD/PhD, or foreign equivalent, whereas the applicant holds a PhD only.

name: Klingenstein-Simons Fellowship Awards in the Neurosciences
funder: Esther A. & Joseph Klingenstein Fund and Simons Foundation
reason: For early-career investigators in the first years of an independent/assistant-professor appointment, which the applicant (a postdoc) does not hold.

name: Faculty Early Career Development Program (CAREER)
reason: Requires holding at least a 50% tenure-track assistant-professor position and being untenured as of the deadline, but the applicant is a postdoc.

name: Jane Coffin Childs Postdoctoral Fellowship
funder: Jane Coffin Childs Fund for Medical Research
reason: Eligibility caps applicants at a PhD conferred no more than 24 months before the deadline and no more than 12 months of postdoc experience, but he is ~7 years post-PhD with ~6 years of postdoc experience.

name: Helen Hay Whitney Foundation Postdoctoral Research Fellowship
reason: Requires a PhD received within the past 2 years and no more than 1 year in the postdoc lab, whereas he finished his PhD in August 2019 and has ~6 years of postdoc experience.

name: Damon Runyon Quantitative Biology Fellowship
reason: Requires a PhD conferred within 5 years of the deadline, but his PhD was conferred in August 2019, roughly 7 years before a 2026 deadline.

name: Doris Duke Clinical Scientist Development Award (CSDA)
reason: Restricted to physician-scientists holding an MD, DO, or foreign equivalent with an active U.S. medical license, so a PhD-only computational scientist is ineligible.

name: Doris Duke Physician Scientist Fellowship
reason: Open only to MD, MD/PhD, or DO physicians in or recently completing clinical subspecialty fellowship training, which excludes a PhD-only applicant with no medical/clinical degree.

name: Melanoma Research Alliance (MRA) Grant Program
reason: Its investigator mechanisms require a faculty appointment (Young Investigator within 5 years of a first academic faculty appointment; Established past that), but he is still a postdoc rather than an independent faculty investigator.

name: Mentored Clinical Scientist Career Development Award (Parent K08) — with K23 companion
funder: NIH — NCI, NHLBI, NIDDK and other ICs
reason: Eligibility is limited to clinicians holding a clinical doctoral degree (MD, DO, DVM, DDS, PharmD, or clinical PhD) for physician-scientist career development, and a computational/basic-science PhD does not qualify.

name: Schmidt Science Fellows
funder: Schmidt Sciences / Schmidt Science Fellows (in partnership with Rhodes Trust)
reason: Applicants must complete their PhD (including defense) between May 1, 2026 and June 30, 2027, but he had his PhD conferred in August 2019.

name: Sloan Research Fellowship
reason: Eligibility requires being tenure-track but untenured faculty with a regular teaching obligation, whereas he is still a postdoc.

name: Packard Fellowships for Science and Engineering
reason: Eligibility is restricted to faculty in the first 3 years of a first tenure-track appointment, and he holds a postdoc position rather than a faculty appointment.

name: Targeted Grants in Mathematics and Physical Sciences (MPS)
reason: PIs and co-Is must hold tenured/tenure-track (or equivalent) positions, which a postdoc does not, though the 'or equivalent' clause introduces some ambiguity.

name: Google PhD Fellowship
reason: The fellowship requires full-time PhD enrollment for the award duration and recognizes current PhD students, but he completed his PhD in 2019.

name: Google Research Scholar Program
reason: Eligibility is limited to assistant/associate professors, whereas he is still a postdoc without a faculty position.

name: Accelerating and Scaling Biological Sciences with AI (GPU Compute RFA)
reason: Eligibility requires PIs and Co-PIs to hold faculty or equivalent independent-investigator status, which he does not have as a postdoc.

name: AACR Hematologic Malignancies Research Fellowship
reason: Requires a postdoctoral fellow within 5 years of the most recent doctoral degree, but his PhD was conferred in August 2019 (~7 years prior).

name: AACR Trailblazer Cancer Research Grants (Early-Stage and Mid-Career tracks)
reason: Both tracks require an independent faculty appointment (assistant professor with independent lab, or tenured associate professor), which he does not hold as a postdoc.

name: AACR NextGen Grants for Transformative Cancer Research
reason: At grant start the applicant must hold a tenure-track assistant-professor position, which he does not have as a postdoc.

name: AACR-AstraZeneca Career Development Award for Physician-Scientists (in Honor of Jose Baselga)

reason: The award is restricted to physician-scientists, and he holds a PhD only with no medical/clinical degree.

name: Freeman Hrabowski Scholars Program
reason: Restricted to early-career faculty who have led an independent lab, which he does not have as a postdoc.

name: LSRF Postdoctoral Fellowship
reason: Requires being within 5 years of the PhD as of Oct 1, 2026, but his PhD was conferred in August 2019 (~7 years prior).

name: LRF Postdoctoral Fellowship Grant
reason: The grant limits PhD applicants to those with fewer than 5 years of postdoctoral work by the cycle start date, and he has roughly 6 years of postdoc experience as of July 2026.

name: LRF Clinical Investigator Career Development Award (CDA)
reason: Eligibility is restricted to licensed clinical physicians in ACGME-accredited specialties, and he holds a PhD only with no medical degree or clinical training.

name: Gabrielle's Angel Foundation Medical Research Award

reason: The award is given to institution-nominated investigators who are typically Assistant Professors, whereas he is still a postdoc without a faculty appointment.

name: ALSF 'A' Award

name: ALSF Innovation Grant
reason: The grant is limited to independent/established investigators, typically faculty with a track record, while he remains a mentored postdoc.

name: ALSF Reach Grant

name: ALSF Pediatric Oncology Student Training (POST) Grant
reason: The POST grant supports students (including graduate students) doing mentored research, but he completed his PhD in 2019 and is now a postdoc, not a student.

name: Discovery Boost Grant (DBG)

name: ACS - Fanconi Cancer Foundation Discovery Boost Grant (RFA)

reason: It requires independent investigators with a full-time faculty appointment (or equivalent), a status the applicant lacks as a postdoc.

name: Mission Boost Grant (MBG)

name: Ruth L. Kirschstein NRSA Individual Predoctoral Fellowship (Parent F31)
funder: NIH (NCI and most other Institutes/Centers participate)
reason: It requires the applicant to be currently enrolled in a PhD program at the dissertation-research stage, but he received his PhD in August 2019.

name: NRSA Individual Predoctoral Fellowship to Promote Diversity in Health-Related Research (Parent F31-Diversity)

name: NIH Pathway to Independence Award (K99/R00)
reason: The K99 caps postdoctoral experience at no more than 4 years at submission (up to 6 years with temporary extensions), and the applicant has ~6-7 years of postdoc experience, exceeding even the extended limit.

name: Mentored Clinical Scientist Research Career Development Award (K08)
reason: It requires a clinical doctoral degree (MD, DO, etc.) or clinical PhD with typically an active clinical license, whereas the applicant is a PhD-only computational scientist with no clinical degree.

name: NIH Director's Early Independence Award (DP5)

reason: The DP5 requires completing the terminal research doctorate within a narrow window around the award (about May 1, 2025 to Sept 30, 2027), targeting finishing or brand-new PhDs bypassing a postdoc, but he earned his PhD in August 2019.

name: Career Development Program (CDP) - Fellow

reason: The Fellow level is restricted to early-stage postdocs with 3 years or less of postdoctoral research training by the award start date, but he has ~6 years of postdoctoral experience.

name: Career Development Program (CDP) - Special Fellow

reason: The Special Fellow level targets roughly 3-5 years of postdoctoral training, but at ~6 years post-PhD (and more by any 2027 start date) he exceeds that window.

name: Career Development Program (CDP) - Scholar

reason: Eligibility requires an independent, tenure-track (or equivalent) faculty investigator with substantial national research support, but he is still a mentored postdoc.

name: Career Development Program (CDP) - Scholar in Clinical Research

reason: Eligibility requires appointment to an independent tenure-track faculty position leading independent clinical research, but he is a computational postdoc with no faculty appointment.

name: Translational Research Program (TRP)

reason: Eligibility requires an independent investigator with 3+ years in an independent faculty position and explicitly states postdocs are not eligible, but he is still a postdoc.

name: Discovery Grant Program (DGP) - formerly Blood Cancer Discoveries Grant (BCDG)

reason: Eligibility requires an established/independent investigator with more than 3 years in an independent faculty appointment, but he is still a postdoc.

name: Clinical Investigator Career Development Award

name: Young Investigator Award

name: Clinician Scientist Development Grant (CSDG)

reason: Eligibility requires fewer than 5 years of mentored research experience, but he has ~6 years of postdoctoral experience, exceeding the limit.

funder: U.S. Department of Defense — CDMRP, Defense Health Program
reason: Both PI tracks require an independent investigator at Assistant Professor level or above, so a postdoc cannot serve as PI.

name: Bone Marrow Failure Research Program (BMFRP) — Investigator-Initiated Research Award (IIRA)
funder: U.S. Department of Defense — CDMRP, Defense Health Program
reason: Eligibility is limited to 'independent investigators at all career levels,' and a postdoc does not meet the independent-investigator requirement.

name: Bone Marrow Failure Research Program (BMFRP) — Resource Development Award (RDA)
funder: U.S. Department of Defense — CDMRP, Defense Health Program
reason: Eligibility is limited to 'independent investigators at all career levels,' which a postdoc does not satisfy.

name: Peer Reviewed Cancer Research Program (PRCRP) — Career Development Award – Scholar Option (CDA-SO)
funder: U.S. Department of Defense — CDMRP, Defense Health Program
reason: The Scholar must be an independent early-career investigator with independent lab space and the RFA states 'postdoctoral fellows are NOT eligible,' so a postdoc is excluded.

name: St. Baldrick's Scholars
reason: Eligibility requires holding (or holding by award start) a full-time faculty position, which he does not have as a current senior postdoc.

name: "A" Award
reason: Eligibility requires being early-career independent faculty within 5 years of a first Assistant Professor appointment, which he lacks as a postdoc.

name: Research Grant Funding
reason: The PI must be a registered oncology nurse actively involved in cancer patient care, whereas he is a computational PhD scientist with no nursing credential.

name: Research Scholar Grants (RSG)
reason: Eligibility requires being an independent investigator first appointed as full-time faculty 8 or fewer years ago, but he holds no faculty appointment as a postdoc.

name: Research Scholar Grants (RSG)
reason: Eligibility is restricted to independent, full-time faculty (first appointed 8 or fewer years ago) with institutional resources for independent research, whereas the applicant is still a postdoctoral fellow without a faculty/independent-investigator appointment.

name: Damon Runyon Fellowship Award
reason: For basic scientists the degree must have been conferred within ~18 months of the deadline, but the applicant's PhD was conferred in August 2019 (~7 years ago), far outside that window.

name: Career Transition Award
funder: Susan G. Komen Breast Cancer Foundation
reason: Limited to senior postdocs with no more than 5 years of total postdoctoral research experience at LOI, but the applicant has roughly 6 years of postdoctoral experience.

name: Individual Rising Star Grant
funder: The Honorable Tina Brozman Foundation for Ovarian Cancer Research ("Tina's Wish")
reason: PhD applicants must be within 3 years of their degree, but the applicant earned his PhD in August 2019 (~7 years ago), exceeding that limit.

name: Young Investigator Award (YIA)
funder: American Society for Clinical Oncology (ASCO) / Conquer Cancer
reason: The award is restricted to physicians within 10 years of their medical degree who hold an active medical license, so a PhD-only computational scientist with no MD or clinical license cannot apply.

name: Ovarian Cancer Research Program - Ovarian Cancer Academy Early-Career Investigator Award
reason: The FY26 program announcement states that individuals in a postdoctoral research position at the time of full application submission are not eligible (PI must be within five years of their last postdoc), which excludes a current senior postdoc.

name: Kidney Cancer Research Program - Academy of Kidney Cancer Investigators Early-Career Scholar Award (AKCIECSA)
reason: Eligibility explicitly bars applicants who are still in a postdoc or clinical fellowship at the application deadline, so a current senior postdoc cannot apply.

name: AGA-Caroline Craig Augustyn & Damian Augustyn Award in Digestive Cancer
reason: It requires a full-time faculty position and currently holding an NIH K-series (or equivalent, >=4-yr) career-development award with time remaining, neither of which a postdoc holds (and he is also >7 years post-PhD by the April 2027 start).

name: Team Science Awards
reason: The lead applicant must be at least an Associate Professor and even the encouraged early-career team role requires an independent researcher within 7 years of a first faculty appointment, so a postdoc with no faculty appointment cannot serve as a qualifying applicant.

name: General RFP - Young Investigator Award
reason: It is limited to Young Investigators within 5 years of their first academic faculty appointment, and he holds no faculty appointment (still a postdoc), so he cannot qualify.

name: Career Development Award
funder: American Society for Clinical Oncology (ASCO) / Conquer Cancer
reason: It requires a physician (MD, DO, or international equivalent) with an active medical license in the 1st-4th year of a clinical-department faculty appointment, so a PhD-only non-physician is ineligible.

name: Lustgarten Foundation-AACR Career Development Award for Pancreatic Cancer Research, in Honor of Ruth Bader Ginsburg
reason: It requires assistant-professor rank with independent lab space at grant start, which a current postdoc does not hold.

name: Clinician Scientist Development Grant (CSDG)
reason: It is restricted to full-time faculty clinician-scientists holding an active clinical license and engaged in clinical care, so a computational scientist with no clinical license or clinical practice cannot apply.

name: AACR-Sontag Foundation Brain Cancer Research Fellowship
reason: Eligibility requires the most recent doctoral degree to have been completed within the past 5 years, but his PhD was conferred in August 2019 (~7 years ago), exceeding the window.

name: Residents/Fellows in Radiation Oncology Research Seed Grant
reason: The award requires being a current radiation oncology resident or radiation oncology clinical fellow enrolled in an accredited US clinical training program, a physician/clinical-trainee status a PhD-only computational scientist cannot hold.

name: AACR Career Development Awards for Translational Breast Cancer Research
funder: American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) / Breast Cancer Research Foundation (BCRF)
reason: Eligibility is limited to faculty at the assistant professor/instructor/research assistant professor level who started their first independent faculty position within the past 6 years, but he is still a postdoc with no faculty appointment.

name: Investigator-Initiated Research Grant
reason: The grant is restricted to Independent Investigators at the level of Assistant Professor (or equivalent) or higher, whereas he is still a postdoctoral researcher.

name: Hollis Brownstein Research Grants Program
reason: The New Investigator award requires being an independent investigator within 7 years of the start of a first independent faculty-level appointment, which he has never held as a postdoc.
